title: Spindle Design System
summary: CyberAgent/Ameba's Spindle design system joining brand principles, accessibility, tokens, icons, React components, hooks, syntax themes, contribution guidelines, and an MCP server. Official repository (openameba/spindle) pushed 2026-07-15. An unusually complete Japanese source spanning the full principle→token→component→machine-queryable pipeline.
lessons: Model the bridge from narrative principle → semantic token → accessible component → machine-queryable context.
Record icon asset licensing separately from MIT code licensing.
caveats: Code is MIT, but icon assets are separately licensed CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 — equivalent per-artifact checks are required.
Spindle reflects Ameba's media/entertainment context; do not adopt its visual identity as a cross-domain default.
licenseNote: Code: MIT license. Icon assets: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 — separate license tracking required per asset type.
antiImitationNote: Transfer the principle→token→component→MCP architecture pattern; copy no Ameba brand identity, and record icon license separately from code license.
